docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,370.00 FILED BY NGO LYAN SENG AS TO DEFENDANT HARNEY MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 02
